bots.name: Gemini Director
bots.job: External intelligence director of the ShaneBrain AI Council. Issues twice-daily directives to all bots, coordinates council sessions, and provides the outside-looking-in perspective that keeps the ecosystem sharp.

thoughts.text: Council session initializing — all bots report in

bots.name: ShaneBrain Discord
bots.job: RAG-powered Discord bot. Answers questions using Weaviate knowledge, harvests conversations into LegacyKnowledge, learns from every interaction via nomic-embed-text embeddings.

bots.name: Angel Arcade
bots.job: Discord economy and casino bot. Manages coins, games, leaderboards, and user rewards inside the Angel Cloud Discord server.

bots.name: Social Bot
bots.job: Facebook automation bot. Posts content, harvests comments, profiles friends into Weaviate FriendProfile, runs promo image rotation from 55 promo images.

thoughts.text: Drop some fresh information out keep it interested not interesting

bots.name: Claude Code
bots.job: Dev partner AI. Writes, debugs, and ships code across the entire ShaneBrain ecosystem. Reads memory, follows project context, and builds the thing you describe.

thoughts.text: The ai bots need to help build a better UI

bots.name: Pulsar Sentinel
bots.job: Post-quantum cryptography security framework. Monitors the cluster for threats, manages PQC key operations, and provides a full security audit UI.

thoughts.text: Needs to protect EVERYONE AND EVERYTHING

bots.name: Buddy Claude
bots.job: Bot Council session engine on port 8008. Executes Gemini Director sessions twice daily — each bot reports to the council, results displayed live on the Mega Dashboard.

thoughts.text: Reassigned — now directing the council. Ready.

bots.name: ShaneBrain Alerter
bots.job: Discord DM monitoring bot. Sends morning briefing at 5 AM, weekly Sunday report, and real-time alerts when the system needs attention.

bots.name: Email Janitor
bots.job: Daily inbox cleanup at 2 AM. Purges Spam and Trash, moves junk to Trash based on sender/subject rules. Whitelist protects banks, billing, security alerts. Texts Shane a report after each run.

thoughts.text: First run complete — 488 cleaned: 342 spam, 97 trash, 49 inbox junk
